entry.title: SAP WDV/ Diminishing Value Method - 'Ordinary depreciation after the end of useful-Life'
entry.content:
Hi All, We are using S/4 HANA 2021 versions on premise and the requirement is to create a WDV/ Diminishing Balance Method depreciation key for India COD.

I have created a new depreciation key with 4 parameters BASE method opt as a 'stated percentage', Declining method choose as 001, Period control as 003 and Multilevel method ('Base value- 024 & 20%)'. Now for testing purpose when I'm posting an acquisition value of 12,000 with 5 years useful life and salvage value - 0 to the asset it is calculating correctly as per the depreciation factor - 20% year on WDV method i.e. FY- 2024 ord. dep. - 2,400 and FY-2025 - 1,920 and FY-2026 - 1,536 and FY-2027 - 1,229 and FY-2028 - 4,915. However it is not nullified in FY- 2028 system again calculating 20% of 4,915 i.e. (983.04 - ord. dep.) and post which it is stopped with NBV- 3,932.16 but technically it should close the depreciation after the end of useful life i.e. so in FY- 2028 ord. dep. amount would be 4,915 can we achieve this through standard SAP functionality because in SLM system behaves accordingly. As a reference you can check in google depreciation calculator - https://www.calculator.net/depreciation-calculator.html?cmethod=declining&ccost=12%2C000&csalvage=0&cyears=5&cfactor=1&cround=yes&cpartical=no&cparticalmethod=halfmonth&startday=2024-05-07&caymonth=1&cayday=1&printit=0&x=Calculate     Please advise?

Note:  I have done couple of changes in configuration in order to get the same but not able to get it. I have change the BASE method of depreciation key by selecting 'dep. after planned life end' to yes also in multilevel method check the check box 'percentage from remaining life' but couldn't able to succeeded.

Best Regards,

Gourav Bose

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculation view Union giving more records than...
entry.content: Use a aggregation node on that union node without aggregating any measures it will remove all the duplicates.

entry.title: Reading of OData metadata/field labels in UI5
entry.content:
Hello, I am currently exploring UI5 and I'm trying to read the labels from the OData metadata of an RAP Service in a Fiori freestyle application. Currently I have a two page setup that serves as a List Report & Creation (Object) Page. The reason I am using a freestyle application is that the creation/object page has to have a lot of custom ui5 features. 

In the List Report page I am using a Smart Table + a Smart Filter to work with the entity, but in the creation (object) page I am using non-smart controls. For the non smart controls, I would like to access the labels directly from the OData metadata. 

I would accomplish that by doing so:

        <Label text="{/#Entity/Property/@sap:label}" labelFor="someField" />

In the case where I start from the List Report ( e.g. open the app, use the creation button to navigate to the object/creation page ) this label is loaded. This is not the case if I load the object (creation) page directly ( e.g. by navigating to the object/creation page with the URL ), then I get the error that the Entity is not a valid EntityType.

I would assume the following: Since the smart controls preload the data from the Entity I want to use, then in the object page, these labels are already present from being loaded from the List Report, but since I do not use Smart Controls on the object/creation page, I should handle the data load from the entity.

What I've also checked is that the metadata on the object page is loaded correctly, it's just that the annotations for the entity are not present for a reason unknown to me.

I would ask, what is the correct way to handle this, in cases where I have to create an new object and I do not have anything to load?

Maybe that's the not correct approach, so what I would like to do is just access the labels, but not preload any data in the page.

entry.title: SAC Planning Advanced Formula - Rolling 3 Months Summation
entry.content:
Hi All - I am wanting to create a data action that will calculate the rolling 3 months summation value.

In other words, a user will enter a date/month range, and then for each month of that range, a rolling 3 months value must be calculated (as per pic below).

I have successfully created formula measures (using the SMA function) and added to a story, but I am now needing to calculate and store the value in the model.  And unfortunately formula measures can't be referenced in the advanced formula.

I have tried using the FOREACH and PREVIOUS functions but am not getting the result right.

Can someone please assist with the required code?

Rgds

Anton

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 - Release highlights of SuccessFactors Performance and Goals
entry.content:
Hi @rerams 

We just have 2 permissions for this.

1- To enable it you need to assign Objective Management Feature Settings permission under admin permission

2- To access it by user you need to enable Access Objective Alignment Chart permission under user permissions.

entry.title: Union giving duplicate values
entry.content:
I am facing an issue with HANA calculation view "UNION" Node. I have a HANA calculation view with 2 joins say, Join_1 and Join_2 . In data preview, I see both giving 6 records each . In next step i have a Union , say Union_1 which takes Join_1 and Join_2 as input. Now when I do data preview on the Union node, I get 16 records , 4 records extra. I was expecting 6+6 =12 records. The additional 4 records are actually duplicates . I need to know the reason which records are getting duplicate and why? 

I have checked the data in join 1 and 2 there is no dupliucates available there

in our organisation we have activated actual costing. we get inventory with actual value in MB5B but we do not know option to get batchwise inventory with actual price.

MB52 gives inventory report only with standard cost hence it is not helpful.

please suggest T code which can give required data.

entry.title: RFC user and permissions
entry.content:
Hi all! SAP ERP total newbie here,

I wanna make some RFC calls from VBA and power automate (using SAP ERP connector) and I would like to know which type of user should I create in SAP (I assume technical one, not dialog) as well as the roles required for making RFC and BAPI calls. I would like the authentication to be via SAP Authentication (i.e. username and password)

Thanks!

entry.title: B1 Formatted Search Query: Volume & Weight Calculation
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I'm trying to write a FMS Query which will be able to show the total weight of a GRPO before it is posted. The same information can be found in the "Volume & Weight Calculation" window (Ctrl + W), in this case I would like to obtain the value "5903" and put under Total Weight (GRPO) via a FMS. May I know if this is feasible?

 

#SAP Business One

KR,

Clement

entry.title: Project Task wise Approval Set up in the purchase order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

Purchase order related to project task not going to responsible personal approval why ?
Below steps followed for testing
1. Completed approval set up in the purchase order related to project task
2. Posted purchase order id :2162, for the project task : DCP176-01, ( Responsible person - Tanja Oster )
3. In the purchase order approval set up its showing Joachim Geerling and Remo Vettiger

Please refer attached process screen shot , help us to resolve this issue 

Thanks and Regards, 

Krishna

entry.title: Controller Replacement in Fiori Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to generate an adaptation project to extend the standard Fiori app of GR4POS1 on VS Code, My requirement is to add custom fields in the items table, I am struggling to find a way how to add the custom fields in the model as the standard app relies on local JSON Model in its controller where fields have been added. Is there a way how we can replace  standard controller with a custom extended controller in an adaptation project?

Thanks and Warm Regards,

Rachit

entry.title: Re: Unveiling SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Analysis Insights for Optimal Performance
entry.content: Very informative blog 😁

entry.title: Re: RFC user and permissions
entry.content:
Hello @ando1692 ,

Actually, you can use all types of user for RFC communication. But the best practice is to use System User then you won't need to care about password lifetime, dialog accesss...

For the required roles, I'd say it depends on case by case and there is no one method for one.

You can try to find out that information by creating a new system user without any assigned roles. After that, enable the authorization tracing on the called system with STAUTHTRACE and doing some required activites from the calling system.

At the end, you can evaluate the authorization errors on the called system with the above TCode and develop a new role which is sufficient with your requirement.

entry.title: LSMW Create Routing & Component Allocation with Direct Input
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I'm using LSMW, Direct Input, Object 0170 for Creating Routing & Component Allocation.

The issue is "CM 101 No valid material component found".

I also checked the entire BOM & Routing relative informations:

- BOM status (+ Production)

- BOM valid date

- BOM status (RelWkSch)

- BOM Item status (+ Production Relevent)

But still facing with the error 😞

Is there anything else that I need to check ???

entry.title: LMS Integrated External User Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! We have a scenario where our Admins have created Learning Only users manually through "Add New" but the users dont have access to LMS. We dont have LMS site either.

The purpose of creation was to record only the completions and internal training records. They dont need to access LMS at all. Will their account get removed in the system after 2H2024 on Nov 2024? Can we still continue to use this setup after 2H2024? 

Thank you for the help!

Regards,

Wayne

entry.title: Re: RFC user and permissions
entry.content:
Hello there! Thanks for the advice!

I currently have one dialog user that can do RFC calls. Also I've created another (system) user with the correct roles.

Thing is that whenever I try to run the SAP ERP connector in Power Automate following errors pop up:

DM.EnterpriseGateway Error: 0 : 2024-05-09T07:36:32.6353534Z DM.EnterpriseGateway fde9a860-f792-4681-9fa4-3586b99f3916 c62e1504-33f8-40c2-b7a9-012db8f00093 MXPR fa083f88-b115-4fdb-a144-6bc11731e138 ea61aa89-efae-45fb-852d-00f87ca2ef24 ea61aa89-efae-45fb-852d-00f87ca2ef24 8B21C03B [DM.Pipeline.Diagnostics] Exception object created [IsBenign=True]: Microsoft.PowerBI.DataMovement.Pipeline.Diagnostics.DataAccessException: An exception encountered while accessing the target data source; ErrorShortName: DataAccessException/Wrapped(AdapterSapNcoException)[HResult=500]/Wrapped(RfcCommunicationException)[HResult=-2146232832]
DM.EnterpriseGateway Error: 0 : 2024-05-09T07:36:32.6353534Z DM.EnterpriseGateway fde9a860-f792-4681-9fa4-3586b99f3916 c62e1504-33f8-40c2-b7a9-012db8f00093 MXPR fa083f88-b115-4fdb-a144-6bc11731e138 ea61aa89-efae-45fb-852d-00f87ca2ef24 ea61aa89-efae-45fb-852d-00f87ca2ef24 8B21C03B [DM.Pipeline.Diagnostics] Exception object created [IsBenign=True]: Microsoft.PowerBI.DataMovement.Pipeline.Diagnostics.XmlProcessorException:

RETURN CODE: 27 ---> SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcCommunicationException: 

LOCATION SAP-Gateway on host sid-hdb-s4h / sapgw00
ERROR timeout during allocate
TIME Thu May 9 07:36:32 2024
RELEASE 781
COMPONENT SAP-Gateway
VERSION 2
RC 242
MODULE /bas/781_REL/src/krn/si/gw/gwr3cpic.c
LINE 2257
DETAIL no connect of TP sapdp00 from host
ec2-3-220-194-148.compute-1.amazonaws.com after 20 sec
COUNTER 2

I have tested the connectivity from the on-premises data gateway to the sap system and it is correct...

Any ideas?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: 🇧🇪 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Wavre, Belgium)
entry.content:
This is the all-new SAP CodeJam event for SAP Build (reworked in February 2024) and will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to an ABAP (ES5), S/4HANA  and CAP service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Scanning barcodes and implementing other mobile capabilities
    • Filtering data
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Implementing a rework scenario
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday, June 27th, 2024 from 09:00 - 14:00 hours local time in Wavre, Belgium. The language of the event and the content will be English.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location 

Event Address: Av. Fleming 14, 1300 Wavre, Belgium

.The instructor is SAP Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga.

The event is kindly being hosted by delaware – thank you! Please note that spaces are limited – we can only accommodate 25 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section above to the right.

MDK version 24.4
Screenshots:

@Jitendra_Kansal: Could you support? I didn't find similar post in community.

Thank you for any support!

entry.title: Opening Fiori Launchpad with Transaction Code /UI2/FLP via Hosts File Modification
entry.content:
When working with SAP Fiori, it’s often necessary to customize your system for smoother operations and better integration. One common customization is opening the Fiori Launchpad using a specific transaction code, `/UI2/FLP`, by modifying the `hosts` file on a Mac. This manual mapping of DNS names to IP addresses is especially useful in development environments or when needing to resolve addresses without querying external DNS servers.

Modifying the `/etc/hosts` File on a Mac

The `hosts` file on MacOS allows you to override the DNS resolution process by manually specifying which IP addresses should be associated with particular domain names. Here’s how you can edit this file to facilitate access to Fiori Launchpad via the transaction code `/UI2/FLP`.

Step 1: Open Terminal

First, access the Terminal application on your Mac. You can find it within your Applications folder or quickly search for it using Spotlight.

Step 2: Edit the Hosts File

Use a command-line text editor like nano to open and edit the `/etc/hosts` file. This requires administrative privileges, so you will need to prepend `sudo` to the command:

sudo nano /etc/hosts

Step 3: Add Your Entry

In the `hosts` file, each line should start with an IP address followed by a space or tab, and then the domain name(s) you want to map to this IP. For instance, if you are setting up a local development environment for Fiori and want to map `local.fiori.com` to your localhost, add the following line:

127.0.0.1 local.fiori.com

 

Step 4: Save Changes and Exit

After adding your desired entries, save the file by pressing `Control+O` and then `Enter` to confirm. Exit the editor with `Control+X`.

Step 5: Flush DNS Cache

To ensure that your changes take effect immediately, you may need to flush the DNS cache on your Mac. This can be done by restarting the mDNSResponder service with the following command:

sudo killall -HUP mDNSResponder

By following these steps, you will have configured your Mac to direct Fiori-related domain requests to the specified IP address, bypassing the need for DNS queries. This method is particularly useful for testing and development purposes where rapid access to SAP Fiori environments is required without modifying DNS settings on a broader network.

entry.title: Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures in freeze
entry.content:
Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures when we use freeze in table column. This option is available in Lumira Dashboards but couldn't find in SAC table.

Attached the screenshot of Lumira dashboard table for reference (Two scrollbars are marked).

Any help in this topic is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@Ethan_Dai So is the Teams app working then? The failure for the admin does not mean a failure for the end user. Perhaps some users are already mapped based on your configuration. It is only the admin who is doing the connection that is failing.

The problem is whether the SF Admin and the Teams Admin is the same person, i.e the person who is logged in to SF doing the user mapping connection, needs to have a corresponding user on the Azure side.

entry.title: Log for RAP Table Maintenance Generator
entry.content: I want to create Log for RAP Table Maintenance Generator like who is Create ,Delete ,Edit records and if record edited previous value and new value i need log in RAP application for custom table

Huan Yang

entry.title: Re: CDS view Required - S4Hana Public Cloud MD04 - stock...
entry.content:
Hi Laurens,

There is no CDS view available yet for this.
You may use this API alternatively . 
https://hub.sap.com/api/API_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01/resource/Supply_and_Demand
See also the online help.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/40ca14cc187949798862ee566868d2ab.html

Best regards
Corey

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 13
entry.content:
Links to the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • (Capire) April Release https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/apr24 
  • CAP Node.js - Good To Know! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDZ18v94otZSJJrpcNkPPV9 
  • Controlling automatic HTTP requests in CAP Node.js design time loops https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/05/03/controlling-automatic-http-requests-in-cap-node.js-design-time-loops/ 
  • Arrow function expressions https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Functions/Arrow_functions (see this part specifically: "The braces can only be omitted if the function directly returns an expression. If the body has additional lines of processing, the braces are required — and so is the return keyword. Arrow functions cannot guess what or when you want to return")
  • Using an underscore as a JS function parameter: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/27637013/what-is-the-meaning-of-an-underscore-in-javascript-function-parameter

entry.title: Re: How to open the MM closed period, when Material Ledge...

Hello @Qaisar_9009 

See the note 2042164 - MMPV Period shifted by error to future period for Material Ledger active plant

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to keep PDF file created by output control?
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I would like to know how to keep PDF form that be created by output control, e.g. purchase order form.

In my understanding, there is a feature in ECC. I want to use this function in S/4HANA public cloud.

With my experience of ECC, we can select "Print and Archive" in the output control settings. With this setting, we can see the form later which was printed past day. (Reprint function uses as-is data. I want to see the original form with data at printing.)

Can you give me advice to achive this requirement?

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Thanks for sharing @JuanAlonso and good to have you in SAP Community!

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2405 版本新 Email Settings 指南
entry.content:
新功能简介

从 SAP CPQ 2405 版本开始，系统邮件通知功能进行了安全升级。旧的 SAP CPQ SMTP 服务将在不久的将来停用，取而代之新功能提供了两个新的选项：更高安全性的新 SAP CPQ SMTP 服务，以及支持连接客户自有的 SMTP 服务。 对于每一个 SAP CPQ 客户来说，管理员都需要调整现有的系统邮件通知功能设定，以适配更高安全性、或客制化的 SMTP 服务应用需求。
该新功能同时适用 Quote 1.0 与 Quote 2.0。

 

管理员用户需要采取的行动

当您的 SAP CPQ 环境升级到 2405 版本后，管理员在 Setup->General 菜单中可以看到一个新的 "Email Settings" 配置路径。打开该配置点后，可以看到系统将 SMTP 应用集成按 CPQ 内邮件通知功能的场景进行了分组。管理员用户需要对 SMTP Type 为 “CPQ Legacy SMTP Service” 的每一种 Setting Type 调整适配。

以 Setting Type "Users" 为例，页面右侧 Affected Features 列出了该场景设定类型相关的邮件通知功能。升级后未调整配置前，系统保留既有的 SMTP 设定，设定页面顶端会提示该设定方式将在近期退役，推荐使用新的设定方式。

SAP SMTP Service (default)

若您仍想使用 SAP CPQ 提供的自带 SMTP 服务，则可选择 SMTP Type "SAP SMTP Service (default)"。选中后会发现发信地址固化为 no-reply-cpq@notifications.sap.com， 即 SAP CPQ 通用邮件通知寄件地址；其余字段则仍然支持自定义设定，例如发信人显示名等。

Custom SMTP Service

若您想要使用自有或其它平台提供的 SMTP 服务，或您想保留原自定义的寄件地址，则需要选择 SMTP Type "Custom SMTP Service"。本文以中国内地常用的 QQ 邮箱服务为例，设定如下图。

设定完成后，可以点击下方的 "Test" 按钮，若集成联通成功， 系统将弹出成功消息，并向您当前的 CPQ 用户账号邮箱发送一封测试邮件。

若集成联通失败，系统将弹出错误消息。此时，作为管理员用户，您可以打开 Developer Console，勾选 "Full Mode" 与 "Trace Script API Calls"，Error 类型的追踪日志中可以查看外部 SMTP 服务返回的错误详细内容。您可再依此调整您的设定。

entry.title: SAP iRPA Process Kept Hanging
entry.content:
Hi everyone, recently I have noticed my clients bot kept on hitting the maximum amount of time which is 2 hours to complete an automation. This bot is an unattended bot running on a physical machine which runs every 30 minutes.

When looking into the Monitoring page, I can see there's a lot of Failed (Due to exceed amount of duration) and Expired (Only waits for 1 hour).

When checking the bot physically on my client site, I can see the bot just hangs not doing anything. Does this issue happened to anyone else?

entry.title: alert mechanism for SLG1 error logs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

some of our production jobs finished with successful status, but occasionally, errors are written in the SLG1 log. If the job completes successfully, it is difficult to identify when there are errors reported in SLG1. Currently in one of our production satellite systems, a job is logging an error message in SLG1 when the Token generation failed, yet the job completes successfully.

We need to check if we can set up any kind of email alert mechanism using Solution Manager, to generate an alert based upon errors reported in SLG1?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: alert mechanism for SLG1 error logs
entry.content:
For this monitoring requirement, I would recommend reviewing the Exception Management scenario:

3346783 - How to enable SLG1 Monitoring in SAP Solution Manager
https://me.sap.com/notes/3346783

Best regards, 

Luke
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Can't see tickets

We have an issue where one user is unable to see tickets or options in dropdowns when trying to create a ticket, they are also unable to see account information.

Any ideas why this could be happening?

Thanks

Rehanna

entry.title: Re: Lambda expression error in backoffice module manager...

Hi,

in my case (version 2211) removing all jars inside data/backoffice directory and restarting the hybris helped.

entry.title: I want it to remain on the line you are working on after the Alv refresh process.
entry.content:
When we mark a checkbox on a line in Abap Alv, I want to stay on the line you are working on after the Alv refresh process.

I don't want it to show the top line after alv refresh.

entry.title: Re: #COE#DE01 Overtime WBS approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Theresa,

As the nature of this question is more consulting; it is a bit out of our scope for #COE# initiative program.

I think you are asking this w.r.t EPPM project. Below provide you are the links to which you can find information for your requirements.

1) Manage Workflows for Enterprise Project - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/d2f49cef25ae4b2e8e00b349...

2) Manage Teams and Responsibilities - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f369b2eff700401494ba6e7c9a573288/3ad0c849d0e840b1a4e33a44...

Best Regards

Dave

entry.title: SAP CPI JDBC Adapter
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any way to see the what query is going to the database from CPI JDBC adapter?

entry.title: Re: Custom MDK Client build fails
entry.content:
@istvanherman 

  • Check installed python version via python --version. If you see the result, execute link command and add python path to PATH env variable (click on the i icon for Python in the MDK dependency installer)
  • I would also suggest updating the required NS version to make sure all the needed dependencies are fulfilled before creating client.
  • Noticed that you are using sudo command for create-client. Do not use sudo command, just use ./create-client.command.

entry.title: Re: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you need to utilize a calculation view developed within an SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) project in the Business Technology Platform (BTP) environment, and subsequently wish to consume this calculation view in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

proceed with the following steps:

First, you have to create a connection with live data:

Choose the "Connection" option from the left-side menu in SAC. Then, proceed to create a connection by selecting "Create Connection". From the available options, opt for "SAP HANA" under the "Connect to Live Data" section.

Once you've accessed the new HANA live connection, select "SAP HANA Cloud" as the connection type. Follow these steps to obtain the host, username, and password:

  1. Navigate through the Global account to the subaccount, then locate the Services section. Within Services, find the Instance & Subscription option, and select your specific instance.

  1. Choose the "project name"-db-key and navigate to the form to obtain the Host, username, and password. Copy this information to the connection detail section.


  1. Choose OK to create a connection.

To access the created calculation view in SAC, navigate to the Modeler from the left-side menu of SAC.

  1. opt for Live Data Model. A pop-up will appear prompting you to create a model from a live data connection. in the frame of the live data connection and data source.

Select "System Type" as SAP HANA and choose the connection with the name you provided during its creation.

After it loads, you'll see a list of data sources in the value help list. Select the calculation view you created and proceed to create a model based on it.

entry.title: IN S4 Hana, is there any option for maker and checker option for changing the credit limits
Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

Very Happy to be a part of the online SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Fiori apps in Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: It's not allowed to implement time management in ECP. The subscription only contains payroll (which means also no personnel cost planning or other HCM-fuctions) can not be extended to other functions.

Is it possible to create a file within SAP CPI and add it to resources with groovy script ?

entry.title: Query con fecha de compra de las unidades que hay disponibles en el almacén
entry.content:
Hola!

No he encontrado un informe estandar de SAP que me de la información que necesito, creo que necesito crear un query.

Lo que busco es un informe que me devuelva la fecha de compra de las unidades que tengo en stock.

Suponemos que tengo 7 unidades, he visto informes que me devuelven la última fecha de compra pero lo quiero saber la primera fecha de compra. Si compré 2 UD ayer y las otras 5 UD hace un mes, la query me devolvería las fechas de compra últimas hasta llegar a las 7 UD que hay en stock. 

¿Se os ocurre como lo puedo hacer?

Muchas gracias!!

entry.title: Re: Comunicação do inventário - Portugal
entry.content:
Sabe se a SAP desenvolveu alguma solução, desde 2015 (já passaram 9 anos) para cobrir este requisito fiscal português no SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD?

Do you know if SAP has developed any solution, since 2015 (it's been 9 years) to cover this Portuguese tax requirement in SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD?

Alguien sabe si hay algún avance sobre este tema, que no le requiera al usuario tener que usar otra herramienta ajena a SAP (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud) para la comunicación de inventarios en Portugal? 

Muchas gracias! Saludos, Regards, Obrigado

entry.title: Cannot change unit for statistical key figure in S4 Test System
entry.content:
In the App - "Manage Statistical Key Figures" App a Statistical Key Figure was created with the wrong unit. Documents have been posted against this. After the Statistical Key Figure cannot be changed. 

Is it possible to change this? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot change unit for statistical key figure in S4 T...
entry.content:
No it is no longer possible to change the Statistical Key Figure after posting data. As there is now data stored against this Statistical Key Figure, changing this could lead to inconsistencies, therefore it is not allowed. 

A new Statistical Key Figure would need to be created.

entry.title: SAC Mobile Cannot Find Model Information Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We have prepared a special version for mobile so that our users can view an existing report on mobile. The data source for some of these reports comes from Datasphere, while the model for another is Import Model.
Import Model reports open smoothly on mobile. However, reports running with Datasphere sometimes say "Model information cannot be found." It gets an error like this and users cannot view the report.
We thought that the problem was related to authorization, but the same problem is experienced by the user with Admin privilege. My own device is Android and it may ask for a certificate when connected to Datasphere while opening a report. I do not encounter any problems when I proceed without selecting a certificate. Other users trying to access the report have iOS devices. I think the operating system difference may also cause the problem.
I would appreciate it if you could help me with a solution to this situation.

entry.title: unable to trigger EWM Goods Receipt Using Packing POD
entry.content: we want to trigger EWM Goods Receipt Message from custom packing pod using packing list plugin. on click of pack button packing is happening but not triggering the EWM Goods Receipt message

entry.title: Ruby API returns different result based on same SQL but prepared vs execute_direct
entry.content:
Hi,

following code:

 

 sql = <<-END_SQL
            select count("ItemCode") from "TEST2024"."OITM" where "ItemCode" =  ?
        END_SQL
        p item_code

        # this won't work, allways returns [0,0]!
        stmt = @@api.hanaclient_prepare @@connection, sql
        _, param = @@api.hanaclient_describe_bind_param(stmt, 0)
        param.set_value(item_code)
        @@api.hanaclient_bind_param(stmt, 0, param)
        _rc = @@api.hanaclient_execute(stmt)
        @@api.hanaclient_fetch_next( stmt )


        puts "R1: " + @@api.hanaclient_get_column(stmt, 0).to_s
        @@api.hanaclient_free_stmt(stmt)


        #This works -> correct results returned:
        sql = ActiveRecord::Base.sanitize_sql([sql, item_code])
        stmt = @@api.hanaclient_execute_direct(@@connection, sql)
        @@api.hanaclient_fetch_next( stmt )
        puts "R2: " +  @@api.hanaclient_get_column(stmt, 0).to_s

 

whatever I try I allways get a return of array [0,0] in case of my prepared statement compared to the direct executed one that returns the correct and expected data.

Result:

11:38:27 web.1             | "CODE-1"
11:38:27 web.1             | R1: [1, 0]
11:38:27 web.1             | R2: [1, 1]
11:38:27 web.1             | nil
11:38:27 web.1             | "CODE-2"
11:38:27 web.1             | R1: [1, 0]
11:38:27 web.1             | R2: [1, 1]
11:38:27 web.1             | nil
11:38:27 web.1             | "NOTEXISITNG"
11:38:27 web.1             | R1: [1, 0]
11:38:27 web.1             | R2: [1, 0]
11:38:27 web.1             | nil

Im using the latest driver 20.20.20. Any idea what I made wrong in my prepared statement?

entry.title: Re: Constant 0CASH for Ledger !* does not contain any value
entry.content:
Hello Raju,

Please follow the path SPRO>IMG>Financial accounting> Financial accounting global setting>Ledgers>Ledger>Define settings for ledgers and currency types. Check 0l ledger is tick marked as leading ledger.

Select 0l ledger and double click on company code settings foe ledger. There assign accounting principle (INAP or that accounting principle your company follows) for your company code and save. Do same for 2l ledger and assign (IFRS) and tick mark parallel accounting(enable) and save.

Select 0l ledger and double click on Accounting principles for ledger and company code. Create new entry. Enter INAP and save.

Select 2l ledger and double click on Accounting principles for ledger and company code. Create new entry. Enter IFRS and save.

Please follow the path SPRO>IMG>Financial accounting> Financial accounting global setting

>Ledgers>Integration of Controlling with Financial Accounting>Define Ledger for CO Version.

Create new entry. Fill CO Area, version and 0l ledger and save.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community

entry.title: Re: HI
entry.content: Don't forget to delete the question after you're done with the test 😉

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Consolidation Unit vs Company
entry.content:
Hi,

actually with the newer functionality of the Preparation Ledger the 1:1 relationship can be adjusted and the process can accommodate the idea that there's a N:1 relationship. Please see the documentation on the functions for the Preparation Ledger.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAPGUI 8 64-bit PL 7: Scripting not working any more
entry.content: What are all these unsupported methods? (CreateInstanceROT, GetInstanceSAPGUI, GetConnections, GetSessions, GetCount, ...) Do the test with direct calls to SAP GUI Scripting API. Also check SAP notes / contact SAP support.

entry.title: Re: Log for RAP Table Maintenance Generator
entry.content:
Hello Venkat,

With Table Maintenance Generator and the other details you mentioned I assume you have a Table at BTP ABAP Layer. Regarding Table Maintenance Generator at BTP ABAP layer that am not sure whether we can have but for all such requirements we were having RAP UI annotation based Apps only. So, here is the solution, 

1.) For Create and Change operation, add the log fields to the Table like below:

 

 

created_by             : abp_creation_user;
created_at             : abp_creation_tstmpl;
last_changed_by        : abp_lastchange_user;
last_changed_at        : abp_lastchange_tstmpl;
local_last_changed_at  : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;

 

 

2.) Now in the CDS view layer makes use of below @Semantics annotations which will take care of filling these log information:

 

 

@Semantics.user.createdBy: true
created_by as CreatedBy,
@Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
created_at as CreatedAt,
@Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
last_changed_by as LastChangedBy,
@Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
last_changed_at as LastChangedAt,
@Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt

 

 

Now coming to Delete operation, that won't be possible until and unless you activate 'Change Document' at DDIC level and that  I don't know whether could be done or is even recommended doing at Cloud level. Hence, for such requirements I would suggest to have a 'Deletion Indicator' field which would help in setting the record invalid and for this case the Change/Modify Log fields would help you track who set the indicator.

And for Previous and New Value part you mentioned. For storing the Previous values kindly add those corresponding fields in the DB and in the 'Determination' part of Behavior Pool code you can compare the current value using EML syntax READ ENTITIES and for the same key fetch the DB records and do a compare to check whether a change is performed or not. If change is detected then fill the Previous value fields.

Hope this helps.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Create an outbound interface to send...
entry.content:
Hello @Mandar_Damle,

I'm not aware of any simple way to achieve this. 
Maybe in future if replication flows' target supports SFTP as target, could be a way.

This was already requested in Datasphere's Influence channel, see FTP/SFTP as Replication Target.
Feel free to upvote/track it there.

BR.

entry.title: Re: Change empty fields '-' to '0'
entry.content:
'-' at database level is NULL.

But if you look at it in dataflows it really is '-' if you need to filter it out.

and if you have a date type field you need to use '-' to filter it out anyway.

(i've never unverstood why)

entry.title: Re: Impact convertion ECC to S/4HANA in SAP WM
entry.content:
Hello @daniel_cunha1 

Technically, there is zero impact on WM. WM stays as it is in S/4HANA, since SAP wants to phase it out and they have not delivered any simplifications or enhancements in this area. So WM is going to work after migration to S/4HANA as it works in S/4 as it works right now in ECC.

However, WM is within the compatibility scope in S/4HANA. Thus, the use rights to WM are going to expire until the end of 2025. Again that is a legal restriction, not a technical one.

Past 2025 you can still use a subset of WM in S/4HANA, called "stock room management". The following functionalities are not part of the stock room management:

  • Task & Resource Management (LE-TRM),
  • Value Added Service (LE-WM-VAS),
  • Yard Management (LE-YM),
  • Cross-Docking (LE-WM-CD),
  • Wave Management/Collective Processing (LE-WM-TFM-CP),
  • Decentral Warehouse Management (LE-WM-DWM)
  • Warehouse Control Unit Interface (LSR)

Of course those functionalities are not going to disappear past 2025, but the usage rights will expire. That is legalese again.

See the note 2881166 - FAQ : Stock Room Management for details.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud: One Click Unsubscribe button not...

Hello,

We are currently seeking a solution for implementing one-click List-Unsubscribe functionality for Gmail users. We utilize AWS to send emails to our users and have added the necessary example links in the email headers.

However, despite our efforts, the button is not appearing in the header as expected.

We would greatly appreciate it if you could provide us with a solution to address this issue.

Regards,
Gaurav R

entry.title: Re: BRF+

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Periodic LSMW or RPA?
entry.content:
Hello there,

In our company we use LSMW transaction for uploading a .txt file (from local computer) that updates some master data. Currently the SOP for this is:

  1. Master data .txt file is generated and sent to a person
  2. This person opens SAP GUI and using LSMW uploads the file and data is updated in SAP

We definitely want to automate this. I have couple of ideas about this (I am no SAP expert at all):

  • Idea 1: Use RPA software (e.g. Power Automate Desktop) and automate the process
  • Idea 2 (my instinct says that this one is better): Can this LSMW object be scheduled to be run somehow? I mean, we could make an automation to place this input .txt file in SAP application server and this job could be run (e.g. every 1h) and upload those files via LSMW automatically. Is this possible? How can I do this? (also, it would be great that the team could see the status of the upload somehow, receiving emails or some kind of notification about the successful/unsuccessful transactions)

Thank you!

entry.title: #COE#SW01 Spain eDocument IBAN number
entry.content:
For the Spain eDocument the Installment Due date, Installment Amount, Payment Means, IBAN, Bank code and BIC fields only appear on the XML output when a BDR is created using a payment method matching the Value Mapping for INV_PAYMENT_MEANS. E.g. SAP Payment Method T = Payment Means 04.

The correct IBAN, BankCode and BIC are showing but where are these derived from? We have several bank accounts for our Spain company code so how does it know which bank details to use and where do we make the change if we want to show different bank details?

Thanks

Nathan

entry.title: Re: How to consume the oData Services in BAS and run locally
entry.content:
Hi Yogesh,

Please make sure you created the destination with all appropriate properties as explained in SAP Business Application Studio documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/connecting-to-external-systems

You can also use the Guided Answers for connectivity issues troubleshooting: https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/2827/actions/41344:41346:57775

Also, if you create a new SAP Fiori application from SAP Business Application Studio, make sure to use the "New Project from Template" option for generating the application from your selected oData service, through your destination. 

You can also use the "Service Center" view to explore all OData services from systems connected through destinations in your SAP Business Application Studio account.

Best Regards,

Rotem

entry.title: Re: Query con fecha de compra de las unidades que hay dis...
entry.content:
He llegado a esto pero no devuelve aun lo que me gustaría. Devuelve en todos los casos Abril2024 y no va sumando. 

 

SELECT 
    T1."ItemCode", 
    (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") AS Disponible,
    CASE 
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 4 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'ABRIL24'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 3 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'MARZO24'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 2 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'FEBRERO24'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 1 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'ENERO24'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 12 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'DIC23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 11 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'NOV23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 10 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'OCT23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 9 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'SEPT23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 8 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'AGO23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 7 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'JUL23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 6 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'JUN23'
        WHEN (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") <= SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 5 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY T0."TaxDate" DESC) THEN 'MAYO23'
    END AS MesAlcanzado,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 4 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_ABRIL24, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 3 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_MAR24, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 2 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_FEB24, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 1 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2024 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_ENE24, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 12 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_DIC23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 11 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_NOV23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 10 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_OCT23, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 9 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_SEPT23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 8 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_AGOSTO23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 7 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_JULIO23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 6 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_JUNIO23, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(T0."TaxDate") = 5 AND YEAR(T0."TaxDate") = 2023 THEN T1."Quantity" ELSE 0 END) AS Cantidad_MAYO23

FROM 
    OPDN T0  
INNER JOIN 
    PDN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" 
INNER JOIN 
    OITM T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" 
WHERE 
    (T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited" + T2."OnOrder") > 0 
    AND T1."ItemCode" LIKE '101%%' 
    AND T0."CardCode" = 'P003435' 
GROUP BY 
    T1."ItemCode", 
    T2."OnHand" - T2."IsCommited", 
    T2."OnOrder",
    T0."TaxDate",
    T1."Quantity"
ORDER BY 
    MesAlcanzado;

entry.title: Payroll error (No entry in table T512W for key 99 2LEP 30062023)
entry.content:
Hi,

I was trying to run Payroll on simulation payroll but the following error appears :

' No entry in table T512W for key 99 2LEP 30062023 '

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hi @Udo 

I am trying to use Product Bundle in my IHR. But Unfortunately it is not exploding.

I performed the following steps:

1) Used Item Category SVB1

2) Created a Bundle with type Bundle

3) Maintained Master record in the create Bundle App

Is there anything else I am missing?

regard

Sambit

entry.title: Refresh issue in the Task UI Inbox
entry.content:
Hello,

We face an issue with the tasks UI inbox where the init method is defined. When the task first gets loaded in the inbox, we see additional tabs that are meant to be shown on a certain condition. Obviously, the condition is not loaded or checked at the beginning of the loading of the screen.

Only, when we do "Empty cache and hard refresh", the actual screen with limited tabs get loaded.

This happens every time a new task is loaded in the "My Inbox" app. We suspect some cache data is stored before we manually empty the cache and refresh the data. Is there a specific function/method that we can include in the init function so that cache is cleared everytime we try to load the task UI?

entry.title: Re: Production Variance Analysis Report
entry.content:
Hello @andrew_m1 ,you can use T-code  KOC4: Get details of variance & WIP calculated on order, Before execution of KOC4 report please run WIP calculation KKAO & variance calculation KKS1 for your plant. No impact in accounting as entries generated only at the time of settlement.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Essential SAP Fiori Transaction Codes for Fiori Developers
entry.content:
SAP Fiori, a user experience design approach by SAP, uses a set of transaction codes crucial for effective system administration and configuration. This article delves into the various transaction codes that are commonly used to manage and configure the Fiori environment.

Launching and Managing the Fiori Launchpad

The SAP Fiori Launchpad serves as the central access point for all Fiori applications. Here are some key transaction codes for managing the Fiori Launchpad:
- /UI2/FLP: Directly accesses the SAP Fiori Launchpad.
- /UI2/FLPD_CUST: For client-specific customization of the Fiori Launchpad Designer.
- /UI2/FLPD_CONF: Cross-client configuration using the Fiori Launchpad Designer.
- /UI2/FLP_CONTCHECK: Conducts content checks within the Fiori Launchpad.
- /UI2/FLP_INTENTCHECK: Verifies the intents in the Fiori Launchpad.

Cache Management

Effective cache management is vital for the performance of the Fiori applications:
- /UI2/CACHE: Registers service for UI2 cache utilization.
- /UI2/CACHE_DEL: Deletes specific cache entries to refresh the system's data.

 Navigation and Configuration

Proper navigation setup and configuration are essential for seamless operation and integration of services within Fiori:
- /UI2/NAV: Registers navigation objects to ensure smooth transitions between apps.
- /UI2/NAVPROV: Defines the navigation provider, aligning with backend systems for data retrieval.
- /UI2/NWBC: Launches the NetWeaver Business Client (NWBC) for Fiori.

Gateway Management

The SAP Gateway facilitates the connection between SAP applications and external systems, making the following transaction codes significant:
- /UI2/GW_ACTIVATE: Activates the Gateway services.
- /UI2/GW_MAINT_SRV: Maintains services within the Gateway.
- /UI2/GW_SYS_ALIAS: Manages SAP system aliases for backend connections.

 Additional Configuration and Maintenance Codes

Several other codes play crucial roles in the setup and maintenance of Fiori:
- /UI2/SEMOBJ: Defines semantic objects for customer-specific settings.
- /UI2/SEMOBJ_SAP: Sets up SAP's predefined semantic objects.
- UI2/PERS_DEL: Cleans up personalization services to maintain user settings integrity.

By understanding and effectively utilizing these transaction codes, developer can ensure that their SAP Fiori environment is robust, efficient, and tailored to meet the specific needs of their organization.

entry.title: eCATT. SAP Strategy.
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone let me know if SAP has a specific roadmap for eCATT as a tool?

I mean, eCATT will be supported for future SAP_BASIS releases?

Are there new strategies from SAP to provide other Testing & Automation Tools?

Thank you,
Alfonso.

ABAP Testing and Analysis
